description: REQ-EPNS-005 (line 156) states 'EditingSessionState is unchanged' as an acceptance criterion for same-note re-selection. When the current state is SaveFailedState, this means the system emits EditorFocusedOnPastNote while the session has an unresolved save error. The spec does not address whether emitting a 'focused' event from a 'save-failed' state is semantically valid. An implementer could reasonably question whether the editor can truly 'focus' on a note whose last save failed. This is an edge case that should be explicitly acknowledged or the same-note guard should exclude SaveFailedState.

evidence.snippet: SaveFailedState.currentNoteId -- the note whose save failed (NOT pendingNextNoteId) [...] EditingSessionState is unchanged (same currentNoteId, same isDirty)
